# Sanitized `snmpbulkwalk -On` capture from a lab Extreme EXOS stack (one member,
# two ports). Fictional MACs/IPs. Combined output for every OID root the
# snmp_inventory sweeps walk; parse_walk() filters by root prefix. Format matches
# net-snmp `-On`:  .<numeric-oid> = <TYPE>: <value>
#
# --- IF-MIB ports (ifIndex 1001="1:1", 1002="1:2") ---
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.8.1001 = INTEGER: up(1)
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.8.1002 = INTEGER: down(2)
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.7.1001 = INTEGER: up(1)
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.7.1002 = INTEGER: up(1)
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.3.1001 = INTEGER: ethernetCsmacd(6)
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.3.1002 = INTEGER: ethernetCsmacd(6)
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.14.1001 = Counter32: 5
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.14.1002 = Counter32: 0
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.20.1001 = Counter32: 1
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.20.1002 = Counter32: 0
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.13.1001 = Counter32: 0
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.13.1002 = Counter32: 0
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.19.1001 = Counter32: 0
.1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.19.1002 = Counter32: 0
.1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.1.1001 = STRING: "1:1"
.1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.1.1002 = STRING: "1:2"
.1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.18.1001 = STRING: "uplink-core"
.1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.18.1002 = STRING: ""
.1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.15.1001 = Gauge32: 1000
.1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.15.1002 = Gauge32: 1000
.1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.6.1001 = Counter64: 1000000
.1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.6.1002 = Counter64: 500000
.1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.10.1001 = Counter64: 2000000
.1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.10.1002 = Counter64: 100000
.1.3.6.1.2.1.10.7.2.1.19.1001 = INTEGER: full(3)
.1.3.6.1.2.1.10.7.2.1.19.1002 = INTEGER: half(2)
# --- BRIDGE-MIB FDB (two MACs learned on bridge port 7 -> ifIndex 1001) ---
.1.3.6.1.2.1.17.4.3.1.2.0.11.130.1.2.3 = INTEGER: 7
.1.3.6.1.2.1.17.4.3.1.2.170.187.204.221.238.255 = INTEGER: 7
.1.3.6.1.2.1.17.1.4.1.2.7 = INTEGER: 1001
# --- LLDP neighbor on local ifIndex 1001 ---
.1.0.8802.1.1.2.1.4.1.1.9.0.1001.1 = STRING: "core-1"
.1.0.8802.1.1.2.1.4.1.1.7.0.1001.1 = STRING: "1:52"
.1.0.8802.1.1.2.1.4.1.1.8.0.1001.1 = STRING: "Uplink to distribution"
.1.0.8802.1.1.2.1.4.1.1.10.0.1001.1 = STRING: "ExtremeXOS version 31.7"
.1.0.8802.1.1.2.1.4.1.1.5.0.1001.1 = STRING: "00:04:96:aa:bb:cc"
# --- Extreme VLANs (VID 100 "Data", VID 200 "Voice") ---
.1.3.6.1.4.1.1916.1.2.1.2.1.10.1 = INTEGER: 100
.1.3.6.1.4.1.1916.1.2.1.2.1.10.2 = INTEGER: 200
.1.3.6.1.4.1.1916.1.2.1.2.1.2.1 = STRING: "Data"
.1.3.6.1.4.1.1916.1.2.1.2.1.2.2 = STRING: "Voice"
.1.3.6.1.4.1.1916.1.2.1.2.1.12.1 = INTEGER: 1
.1.3.6.1.4.1.1916.1.2.1.2.1.12.2 = INTEGER: 1
# --- Extreme stacking + sensors (slot 1) ---
.1.3.6.1.4.1.1916.1.33.2.1.3.1 = INTEGER: 1
.1.3.6.1.4.1.1916.1.33.2.1.21.1 = INTEGER: 38
.1.3.6.1.4.1.1916.1.32.1.4.1.9.1 = Gauge32: 12
.1.3.6.1.4.1.1916.1.32.2.2.1.2.1 = Gauge32: 1000000
